description: Finds passenger-car brands once common in Denmark but now with small surviving registered fleets. Use for disappeared, forgotten, or nearly gone brands. Requires substantial historical volume.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS all_time = COUNT(*), current = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | EVAL gone_pct = ROUND((all_time - current) * 100.0 / all_time, 1) | WHERE all_time >= 5000 AND gone_pct >= 90 | SORT all_time DESC | LIMIT 30
